title: Command Packaging, Build Identity, Cross-Platform Behavior, and Distribution · Language Lens: Pokedex Go Command Package Layout
summary: The binary works only from the repository root, embeds no version identity, writes beside itself, assumes Unix signals and paths, and ships an untested archive from a dirty tree. Predict the user decision, Go ownership, command state, API contract, resource budget, failure, and observable evidence before reading the governing source.
